user_message: Can you pull the context on Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery? I need to map the stakeholders.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-01 12:40 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery competitive positioning

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-18 16:33 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with competitive positioning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 08:00 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery
Date: 2024-01-19
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), David (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery)

[00:01:30] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into competitive positioning.

[00:06:00] David (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:14:00] David (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:19:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on security compliance and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:21:00] David (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

content.title: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery - competitive positioning
